home.title: SimMagic
home.intro: From hard problem to clear solution using repeatable steps.

about.title: About SimMagic
about.intro: SimMagic is a practical way of building: define the real problem first, find the magic in the idea, then ship a concrete solution.
about.makerBody: SimMagic is built by sim007 with a focus on open source, reusable patterns, and clear documentation.
about.philosophyBody: Complexity can be creative, but outcomes must stay clear, testable, and shareable.

model.title: The SimMagic model
model.intro: This flow helps turn ideas into working software in a consistent way.
model.problemDesc: Define the real pain and context.
model.magicDesc: Iterate until the core idea clicks.
model.solutionDesc: Build, validate, and publish a concrete solution.

solutions.title: Solutions
solutions.intro: Projects that show the SimMagic model in practice.

blog.title: Blog
blog.intro: Notes, experiments, and lessons learned from open-source work.
